unexpected_finds.anchor_069r1_expectation: 069r1 cited 'Jimbo-Miwa 1981' implying two authors throughout the series
unexpected_finds.actual_finding: Part I (DOI 10.1016/0167-2789(81)90013-0, Physica D 2(2):306-352) has THREE authors: Michio Jimbo, Tetsuji Miwa, AND Kimio Ueno. Parts II and III have only Jimbo and Miwa.
unexpected_finds.novelty: Mild. The 'Jimbo-Miwa-Ueno' three-author Part I is well-known to specialists in isomonodromic deformation theory but is often abbreviated 'Jimbo-Miwa 1981' in informal cites including 069r1.
unexpected_finds.research_implication: When acquiring Part I via ILL or ScienceDirect, verify the three-author byline; if the substrate-gap closure leans on the framework chapter (§2-§3 of Part I) rather than the P_III specialization (Part II), Ueno's solo work (Proc. Japan Acad. 56A:97 = 10.3792/pjaa.56.97; 56A:103 = 10.3792/pjaa.56.103; 56A:210 = 10.3792/pjaa.56.210) may be additionally relevant as he developed the irregular-singular-point case independently in his 1979 master's thesis.

unexpected_finds.anchor_069r1_expectation: 069r1 cited 'papers I-V' implying a five-paper series
unexpected_finds.actual_finding: The Physica D series contains only Parts I, II, III. The likely source of the 'I-V' is conflation with the four 1980 Proc. Japan Acad. precursor notes (Deformation I-IV at 10.3792/pjaa.56.{143,149,269,301}) plus possibly the 'Aspects of Holonomic Quantum Fields' 1980 chapter (10.1007/3-540-09996-4_51).
unexpected_finds.novelty: Moderate. The 069r1 cite drift is loose enough that synth at LANE-1 should NOT assume a fifth paper exists. If 069r1 substrate analysis depends on a 'Part IV' or 'Part V' content, that content does not exist under this title; the relevant material is in the 1980 Proc. Japan Acad. precursors (all Tier 1 OPEN).
unexpected_finds.research_implication: Cross-reference 069r1 phase-d-verdict.md to confirm the cite was not dependent on hypothetical Parts IV-V. If yes, raise as halt-condition for synth. If no (most likely), the cite is recoverable as 'Physica D Parts I-III + Proc. Japan Acad. precursors I-IV'.

unexpected_finds.anchor_069r1_expectation: 069r1 anomaly OQ-W21-LITERATURE-ALTERNATIVE listed 'Forrester-Witte 2002' as a paywalled-acquisition target requiring institutional access
unexpected_finds.actual_finding: Forrester-Witte 2002 (10.1002/cpa.3021, CPA) has an open-access arXiv preprint at math-ph/0201051 (submitted 2002-01-24, license: arXiv assumed-1991-2003). Content is verified equivalent to the Wiley CPA published version per Crossref abstract verbatim match. This is a Tier 1 OPEN reference; no acquisition action is needed.
unexpected_finds.novelty: Significant. Reduces the literature-acquisition burden for 069r2 from 3 papers to potentially 1 (Jimbo-Miwa Part II) or 0 (if Path γ below proves sufficient).
unexpected_finds.research_implication: Path γ (Forrester-Witte 2002 from arXiv + already-acquired Okamoto 1987 Funkcial. Ekvac. 30:305) becomes the lowest-cost substrate-closure pair for A.1.5.F1. Synth at LANE-1 should attempt Path γ first before invoking acquisition envelopes.
